name: Send advice from three AI personas via LINE, Gemini, and Google Sheets

parameters.content:
## Overview
This workflow lets users send any worry or question to a LINE bot and instantly receive advice from three distinct AI personas — a Fortune Teller 🔮, a Business Coach 💼, and a Best Friend 😊 — all powered by Google Gemini.

Each conversation is automatically logged to Google Sheets for review and analysis.

### How it works
1. A user sends a text message to your LINE bot
2. The message is parsed and passed to Gemini via Basic LLM Chain
3. Gemini responds as three different personas in a single JSON reply
4. The advice is saved to Google Sheets
5. A LINE Flex Message carousel is sent back with each persona in a color-coded card

### Setup steps
1. Create a LINE Messaging API channel at https://developers.line.biz and copy your Channel Access Token
2. Get a free Gemini API key at https://aistudio.google.com
3. Create a Google Sheets spreadsheet with a sheet named `advice_history` — add these headers in row 1: `Timestamp`, `User ID`, `Message`, `Fortune Teller`, `Business Coach`, `Best Friend`
4. In the **Set config** node, paste your LINE token, Gemini API key, and Sheet ID
5. Set your LINE webhook URL to the n8n webhook path
6. Activate the workflow and test by messaging your LINE bot

## 1. Receive & configure
Webhook receives the LINE event.
Paste your credentials in **Set config**.

## 2. Parse & route
Extracts userId, replyToken, and message text.
Non-message events (follows, etc.) are skipped immediately.

## 3. Generate advice with Gemini
Builds a structured prompt and calls Gemini.
The response is parsed into three persona fields.

## 4. Log & reply
Saves the conversation to Google Sheets,
then sends a Flex Message carousel back to the user.

assignments.name: LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN
assignments.value: Paste your LINE Channel Access Token here

assignments.name: SHEET_ID
assignments.value: Paste your Google Sheets ID here

parameters.text:
=You are three distinct advisors. Reply to the user's concern below as all three personas.

User's message: {{ $json.messageText }}

Respond ONLY in this exact JSON format with no other text:
{
  "fortune_teller": "advice from the Fortune Teller here",
  "business_coach": "advice from the Business Coach here",
  "best_friend": "advice from the Best Friend here"
}

Persona guidelines:
[Fortune Teller 🔮] Mystical and warm. Reference stars, fate, and intuition. Slightly formal, old-fashioned tone. 3-4 sentences.
[Business Coach 💼] Logical and action-oriented. Give specific next steps. Direct and motivating tone. 3-4 sentences.
[Best Friend 😊] Casual and empathetic. Use phrases like "I totally get it!". Encouraging with a touch of humor. 3-4 sentences.
